name: INXS
bio: INXS continue to earn through durable 1980s and 1990s catalog listening, streaming, and recurring sync-friendly singles.
notable_for: Rhythm-driven rock songs with strong long-tail replay and broad familiarity.
career_highlight: Their signature songs continue to support solid catalog economics decades later.
revenue_drivers: Streaming and nostalgia playlist use sustain catalog demand.
Strong vocal and groove identity keeps key songs easy to revisit.
Film and television use can reactivate long-tail interest.

earnings.assumptions: Estimate keeps INXS's headline range as the artist-side figure and models gross catalog, label, publishing, and writer lanes from that conservative annual range.

ownership.master_owner: Likely split across label, distributor, and artist-affiliated rights depending on recording era
ownership.publishing_owner: Writer and publisher splits materially affect final artist-side income
ownership.catalog_sale_status: No full catalog sale assumption baked into this modeled range
ownership.notes: INXS's page should be read as modeled artist-side annual income, not a public royalty statement. Ownership and label terms can materially change take-home economics.
